subject: [GLOBAL] Fix/override gitlab CI helm entrypoints
commit_message:
[GLOBAL] Fix/override gitlab CI helm entrypoints

GitLab-Ci calls the default docker image entry points,
what in some cases prevent direct execution of scripts commands
in YAML gitlab-co configuration file.

Issue-ID: OOM-1
Signed-off-by: guillaume.lambert <guillaume.lambert@orange.com>
Change-Id: I298479b957408ea43c545c7142ea651274b34eb0
